## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**BOL_CARTON_INFO** -> BOL_CARTON_NUM (CRTN_NO -> CRTN_NO); BOL_HEADER (WAYBILL_NO -> WAYBILL_NO)

**BOL_CARTON_NUM** -> BOL_CONTAINERS (CRTN_CD -> CNTNR_CODE); BOL_HEADER (WAYBILL_NO -> WAYBILL_NO); BOL_PACK_DTL (CRTN_NO->CRTN_NO, PCK_NO->PCK_NO); CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST_NO -> CUSTOMER); ITEM_MASTER (CTNR_SERIAL_NO -> SERIAL_NUMBER)

**BOL_CMMDTY_DESC** -> USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**BOL_CONTAINERS** -> CONTAINER_TYPE (CNTNR_TYPE -> SEQ); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**BOL_CO_INFO** -> BOL_HEADER (WAYBILL_NO -> WAYBILL_NO); CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST_NO -> CUSTOMER); OE_MULTI_SHIP (SHIPTO -> SHIP_SEQ); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_HIST_HEAD (PLIST -> INVOICE); SHIPMENT_HEADER (ORDER_SEQ -> ORDER_SUFFIX); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**BOL_HEADER** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST_NO->CUSTOMER, THIRD_PARTY_FC->CUSTOMER); OE_CARRIER (CARRIER_CD -> CARRIER_CD); OE_CARR_SRV_TYPE (SRVC_TYPE -> SRVC_TYPE); OE_MULTI_SHIP (SHIPTO -> SHIP_SEQ); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**BOL_HIST_HEADER** -> OE_CARRIER (CARRIER_CD -> CARRIER_CD)

**BOL_HIST_PACKING** -> ITEM_MASTER (BIN->BIN, HEAT->HEAT, LOCN->LOCATION, LOT->LOT, PART->PART, SERIAL->SERIAL_NUMBER)

**BOL_HIST_UPS** -> OE_CARRIER (CARRIER_CD -> CARRIER_CD)

**BOL_HIST_XREF** -> OE_CARRIER (CARRIER_CD -> CARRIER_CD)

**BOL_ITEM** -> BOL_CONTAINERS (HU_CODE->CNTNR_CODE, PKG_CODE->CNTNR_CODE); BOL_HEADER (WAYBILL_NO -> WAYBILL_NO); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**BOL_MASTER** -> OE_CARRIER (CARRIER_CD -> CARRIER_CD); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**BOL_MSTR_XREF** -> BOL_HEADER (WAYBILL_NO -> WAYBILL_NO); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**BOL_PACK_DTL** -> BOL_CONTAINERS (CRTN_CD->CNTNR_CODE, PLLT_CD->CNTNR_CODE); BOL_HEADER (WAYBILL_NO -> WAYBILL_NO); INV_CROSS_REF (CUST_PART -> CUSTOMER_PART); ITEM_MASTER (BIN->BIN, HEAT->HEAT, LOCN->LOCATION, LOT->LOT, PART->PART, SERIAL->SERIAL_NUMBER); SHIPMENT_HEADER (ORDER_NO->ORDER_NO, ORDER_SEQ->ORDER_SUFFIX); SHIPMENT_LINES (ORDER_LINE -> ORDER_REC); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**BOL_PALLET_NUM** -> BOL_CONTAINERS (PLLT_CD -> CNTNR_CODE); BOL_HEADER (WAYBILL_NO -> WAYBILL_NO); BOL_PACK_DTL (PCK_NO->PCK_NO, PLLT_NO->PLLT_NO); CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST_NO -> CUSTOMER)

**BOL_PART_INFO** -> BOL_HEADER (WAYBILL_NO -> WAYBILL_NO); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_LINES (LINE -> RECORD_NO)

**BOL_UPS** -> OE_CARRIER (CARRIER_CD->CARRIER_CD, SRVC_TYPE->SRVC_TYPE); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); SHIPMENT_HEADER (SEQ -> ORDER_SUFFIX); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)
